name: CLAUDE.md Writing Service
description: We write and maintain custom CLAUDE.md files for your repositories so Claude Code understands your codebase from day one.
longDescription:
Our team analyzes your repositories — architecture, conventions, tech stack, testing patterns, and team workflows — then writes production-ready CLAUDE.md files that make Claude Code work like a team member who's read every doc and PR.

What you get:
- Unlimited CLAUDE.md files across all your repos
- Coverage of build commands, code conventions, architecture decisions, guardrails, and testing patterns
- Subdirectory-scoped CLAUDE.md files for monorepos
- Ongoing updates as your codebase evolves — request changes anytime
- Cancel anytime, keep your files

Why pay for this?
- The free CLAUDE.md Writer skill helps you write your own, but our service delivers expert-crafted results without you spending the time
- We review your actual codebase, git history, and CI config to catch conventions you might not think to document
- Especially valuable for large codebases, monorepos, or teams onboarding multiple developers onto Claude Code
features: Unlimited CLAUDE.md files across your repos
Monorepo support with scoped CLAUDE.md files
Ongoing updates as your codebase evolves
